name: Paul Kruger Statue (Church Square)
description: Bronze statue of Paul Kruger on a granite plinth, located in Church Square, Pretoria. The statue faces north towards the direction of the Transvaal Republic's capital before British annexation.

name: Queen Victoria Statue (Pietermaritzburg)
description: Bronze statue of Queen Victoria on a marble plinth, located outside the Pietermaritzburg City Hall. Erected in 1901 to commemorate the Boer War.

name: Queen Victoria Statue (Port Elizabeth)
description: Bronze statue of Queen Victoria in front of the Port Elizabeth City Hall. One of several statues of Queen Victoria erected in South Africa after her death.
